2606.11167.title: Multi-Faceted Interactivity Alignment in Full-Duplex Speech Models
2606.11167.paper_summary: Full-duplex spoken dialogue models can listen and speak simultaneously, making them a promising architecture for natural conversation. However, current models are trained solely with supervised learning through token-level likelihood maximization, which does not directly optimize interaction-level behaviors, causing interactivity issues such as excessive silence and ill-timed turn-taking. Recent work has applied reinforcement learning (RL) to improve interactivity, but existing methods address only a limited set of interactive behaviors in their rewards. In this work, we propose a post-training alignment method that comprehensively improves the interactivity of full-duplex spoken dialogue models through RL. We address the four canonical axes of interactivity: pause handling, turn-taking, backchanneling, and user interruption. For each axis, we extract short audio segments from human conversation corpora and optimize the model with axis-specific reward functions. An extra LLM-based reward for response quality prevents semantic degradation. We apply our method to two open-source models, Moshi and PersonaPlex, demonstrating consistent improvements in interactivity on both offline evaluation with pre-recorded audio and real-time multi-turn dialogue evaluation.
2606.11167.paper_summary_zh: 全雙工口語對話模型可以同時聆聽和說話，使其成為自然對話的一個有前景的架構。<lb/>然而，當前的模型僅通過標記級別的可能性最大化進行監督學習，這並未直接優化互動級別的行為，導致了過度沉默和不當輪流發言等互動問題。<lb/>最近的研究已經應用強化學習（RL）來改善互動性，但現有的方法僅在其獎勵中處理有限的一組互動行為。<lb/>在本研究中，我們提出了一種後訓練對齊方法，通過RL全面改善全雙工口語對話模型的互動性。<lb/>我們針對互動性的四個典型軸進行了處理：暫停處理、輪流發言、回應通道和用戶打斷。<lb/>對於每個軸，我們從人類對話語料庫中提取短音頻片段，並使用特定於軸的獎勵函數來優化模型。<lb/>額外的基於LLM的回應質量獎勵防止語義退化。<lb/>我們將我們的方法應用於兩個開源模型，Moshi和PersonaPlex，並在離線評估（使用預錄音頻）和實時多輪對話評估中展示了互動性的一致改善。
2606.11167.author: Atsumoto Ohashi et.al.
2606.11167.authors: Atsumoto Ohashi, Neil Zeghidour, Alexandre Défossez, Eugene Kharitonov
